query:
SELECT 'equipment_templates' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM equipment_templates
UNION ALL SELECT 'game_equipment_catalog', COUNT(*) FROM game_equipment_catalog
UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_inventory_equipment', COUNT(*) FROM agent_inventory WHERE item_type = 'equipment'
UNION ALL SELECT 'game_monster_catalog_total', COUNT(*) FROM game_monster_catalog
UNION ALL SELECT 'game_monster_catalog_capturable', COUNT(*) FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE is_capturable = 1;

UNION ALL SELECT 'game_equipment_catalog', COUNT(*) FROM game_equipment_catalog
UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_inventory_equipment', COUNT(*) FROM agent_inventory WHERE item_type = 'equipment'
UNION ALL SELECT 'game_monster_catalog_total', COUNT(*) FROM game_monster_catalog
UNION ALL SELECT 'game_monster_catalog_capturable', COUNT(*) FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE is_capturable = 1;
